title: localization — PHP attribute contracts
description: Two attributes. #[Translatable] marks Eloquent properties for per-locale storage in a `translations` JSONB column. #[AsTranslation] on class marks the container.

params.name: column
params.description: JSONB column on the model storing localised values. Shape: { locale_code: { field: value } }.

params.name: fallback
params.description: How to resolve when active locale is missing. `none` returns null.

params.name: required_locales
params.description: Locale codes that MUST have values (validation rule). Empty = no constraint.

params.name: max_length
params.description: Per-locale max character length. Null = no limit.

attributes.name: AsTranslation

params.name: column
params.description: Class-level default for the JSONB column name (avoids repeating on every property).
